fields.title: Pandas User Guide
fields.summary: Official guide for data manipulation and analysis using the Pandas library.
fields.description: The Pandas User Guide provides comprehensive documentation on data structures, data cleaning, transformation, aggregation, visualization preparation and time series analysis. It is the authoritative reference for working with structured data in Python.
fields.author: Pandas Development Team

fields.title: NumPy Documentation
fields.summary: Official documentation for numerical computing with NumPy.
fields.description: The official NumPy documentation covers multidimensional arrays, mathematical operations, linear algebra, random sampling and high-performance numerical computation in Python.
fields.author: NumPy Developers

fields.title: Scikit-learn User Guide
fields.summary: Official guide covering machine learning with Scikit-learn.
fields.description: The Scikit-learn User Guide introduces supervised learning, unsupervised learning, model evaluation, preprocessing, feature engineering, pipelines and best practices for machine learning in Python.
fields.author: Scikit-learn Developers

fields.title: Tableau Learning Resources
fields.summary: Official Tableau learning resources for interactive data visualization.
fields.description: Tableau's official learning resources provide practical guidance on dashboards, business intelligence, storytelling with data and effective visualization design.
fields.author: Tableau
